home.heroLead: We advise international clients in English on Slovak law: real estate purchases, company formation, debt recovery, insolvency and disputes before Slovak courts — clear advice, fast action, and a price you know up front.
home.trustLabel: Trusted by entrepreneurs, companies and investors — Slovak and international
home.servTitle: How we help international clients in Slovakia
home.servLead: We advise exclusively on the law of the Slovak Republic — from buying property to disputes before Slovak courts. Pick an area to see exactly what we handle, at what price, and how we work together.
home.whyTitle: Three steps to a clear solution

why.title: Book a consultation
why.desc: Online via video call, in English — or in person. Choose a slot and describe your situation; first reply within 24 hours.

why.title: We agree the plan and price
why.desc: We propose a solution under Slovak law and a fixed price up front. No hourly surprises.

why.title: We handle it
why.desc: We act for you before Slovak courts and authorities and keep you informed at every step — no travel to Slovakia needed in most matters.

home.teamTitle: The people who will stand by you
home.teamLead: A well-coordinated team of attorneys with real experience in insolvency, corporate law and litigation.
home.blogLead: Practical articles for business owners. No extra theory.
home.ctaBandTitle: Got a legal matter in Slovakia? Let’s start today.
home.ctaBandLead: Your first consultation is non-binding — online in English, or at our office. Pick a slot that suits you.

services.heroLead: From buying property in Slovakia to rescuing a company in crisis. We advise exclusively on Slovak law — with a clear process and a fixed price.
services.packagesLead: Selected services can be ordered online at a known price. More complex matters we handle after a consultation.

about.heroTitle: A Slovak law firm that speaks your language.
about.heroLead: We started with a simple belief: law should be understandable, predictable and fair for the client. After 20 years of practice, it still holds — and today we advise international clients in English on Slovak law.

values.title: Clarity
values.desc: We explain things so you understand every decision. No empty paragraphs.

values.title: Predictability
values.desc: You know the price and the plan up front, so you decide with a calm mind.

values.title: Results
values.desc: We’re here to resolve your matter — not to drag it out.

story: We founded the firm in 2011 with an ambition to do law differently — closer to the entrepreneur and further from needless complexity.
Today we’re a coordinated team guiding companies from formation through growth to crisis situations. We focus on insolvency, corporate and IT law, real estate and litigation.
We believe the best lawyer is the one you understand. So we explain every matter in human terms and state the price up front.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.lead: Fill in the form and we’ll reply within one business day — in English. Or book a video consultation right away.
contact.fConsent: I agree to the processing of my personal data.
contact.sentLead: We’ll get back to you within one business day.

booking.title: Book a consultation
booking.payNote: Consultation (45 min) · non-binding. We’ll get back to you to confirm the slot.
booking.doneLead: We’ll get back to you shortly to confirm your consultation slot.

shop.heroTitle: Legal services you can order online
shop.heroLead: One-off fixed-price legal packages, ready-made templates to download, and monthly subscriptions for companies. No waiting, no surprises.
shop.pkgLead: A specific service at a known price. Ideal when you need to resolve a single matter.
shop.tplLead: Professionally prepared templates you can adapt in minutes. Download instantly after payment.
tplTrust: In line with current Slovak legislation
shop.subsLead: Keep an attorney on hand for a fixed monthly price. Pick your hours — we handle the rest.
shop.refSentence: We’ve helped over 600 companies, developers and entrepreneurs across Slovakia keep calm in legal matters.
shop.refNote: Client logo slots — to be replaced with real logos.

checkout.title: Complete your order
checkout.doneLead: We’ve sent a confirmation and invoice to your e-mail. Your templates are ready to download in your account.

footer.tag: Law firm registered with the Slovak Bar Association.
footer.fine: This website is for general information only and is not legal advice. All information and services concern exclusively the law of the Slovak Republic and its application by Slovak courts and public authorities.

blog.skLawNote: This article deals with the law of the Slovak Republic and its application by Slovak courts and authorities.

intl.heroLead: We are a Slovak law firm advising exclusively on the law of the Slovak Republic. If your business, property, debtor or dispute is in Slovakia, we guide you through the Slovak legal system — in English, mostly remotely.
intl.helpTitle: Typical matters we handle for international clients
intl.helpLead: Every matter below is governed by Slovak law and handled before Slovak courts, notaries, the land registry and other Slovak authorities.

help.title: Buying property in Slovakia
help.desc: Purchase contracts, title checks in the Slovak land registry (kataster), escrow arrangements so your money is protected, and registration of ownership.

help.title: Doing business in Slovakia
help.desc: Formation of a Slovak s.r.o. (LLC) for foreign founders — fully remote via power of attorney — plus commercial contracts and corporate housekeeping.

help.title: Recovering debts from Slovak debtors
help.desc: Pre-action demands, Slovak payment-order proceedings, litigation and enforcement — a clear, staged process with known costs.

help.title: Creditors in Slovak insolvencies
help.desc: Filing your claim with the Slovak trustee within statutory deadlines, creditor-committee representation and monitoring of the proceedings.

help.title: Disputes before Slovak courts
help.desc: Civil and commercial litigation, enforcement of foreign judgments in Slovakia, interim measures and settlement negotiations.

remote.title: Video consultation in English
remote.desc: Book a slot online — we discuss your matter, outline the Slovak-law position and agree the next steps.

remote.title: Engagement and power of attorney
remote.desc: You receive an engagement letter and a power of attorney by e-mail. For most matters a simple signed scan is enough; where Slovak authorities require it, we guide you through certification or an apostille.

remote.title: We act in Slovakia for you
remote.desc: We deal with Slovak courts, notaries, the land registry and public authorities on your behalf. Personal attendance is rarely required.

remote.title: Transparent fees
remote.desc: A fixed fee agreed up front for defined matters; invoices in EUR with bank transfer. No hourly surprises.

intl.scopeText: We advise exclusively on the law of the Slovak Republic. We do not advise on the law of your home country — where your matter touches another jurisdiction, we work alongside your local counsel.
intl.ctaTitle: Tell us about your matter in Slovakia
intl.ctaLead: The first consultation is non-binding and held in English.

consent.text: We use cookies — essential ones to run the site and, with your consent, to measure traffic.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.text: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or has moved.
